package repository

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type PatientRepository struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *PatientRepository) FindByID(ctx context.Context, id int) error {
	raw, err := r.db.DB()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	var patientID int
	return raw.QueryRowContext(ctx, "SELECT id FROM patients WHERE id = ?", id).Scan(&patientID)
}
